// src/utils/api.js
const envApiBase=(process.env.REACT_APP_API_BASE_URL||'').trim();const normalizedEnvApiBase=envApiBase.replace(/\/+$/,'');export const API_BASE=normalizedEnvApiBase||(process.env.NODE_ENV==='production'?'':'http://127.0.0.1:5000');export const buildApiUrl=path=>{if(!path){return API_BASE;}return API_BASE?`${API_BASE}${path}`:path;};
